## What

Describe the user-facing change.

## Why

Explain the problem this solves and link the issue or Discussion.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check` passes
- [ ] I tested the changed interaction or documented why it is not runnable yet
- [ ] UI changes include before/after media and keyboard-access notes

## Safety and privacy

- [ ] I removed personal board content, prompts, tokens, and local paths
- [ ] I disclosed any new network access, persistent storage, telemetry, or permissions
- [ ] Documentation is updated where behavior changed
